metrics.label: Daily visits
metrics.description: Unique visits to the public marketing site.

metrics.label: Leads created
metrics.description: New leads captured today.

metrics.label: Leads qualified
metrics.description: Leads marked as qualified by sales today.

metrics.label: Deals created
metrics.description: Sales opportunities opened today.

metrics.label: Deals won
metrics.description: Deals closed-won today.

metrics.label: Deals lost
metrics.description: Deals closed-lost today.

metrics.label: Average response time
metrics.description: Average time to first sales response on new leads, in minutes.

metrics.label: Average deal cycle
metrics.description: For deals closed today, average days from open to close.

metrics.label: Stale deals
metrics.description: Open deals older than 60 days at end of day.

metrics.label: Support tickets opened
metrics.description: Customer support tickets opened today.

metrics.label: Average ticket resolution
metrics.description: Average resolution time of tickets opened today, in hours.
